g.text: 0x10 | double | p4.real — float literal (union with i64)
0x10 | char* | p4.str — string / name ptr (not owned)
p1=reg_a | p2=jump_addr | p3=reg_b (jump if a == b)
p1=reg_a | p2=jump_addr | p3=reg_b (jump if a != b)
p1=reg_a | p2=jump_addr | p3=reg_b (jump if a < b)
p1=reg_a | p2=jump_addr | p3=reg_b (jump if a <= b)
p1=reg_a | p2=jump_addr | p3=reg_b (jump if a > b)
p1=reg_a | p2=jump_addr | p3=reg_b (jump if a >= b)
p1=reg | p2=jump_addr (jump if reg IS NULL)
p1=reg | p2=jump_addr (jump if reg NOT NULL)
Inversion rule: WHERE age>18 emits OP_LE (skip when NOT >)
p1=reg | p2=jump_addr jump if reg is truthy
p1=reg | p2=jump_addr jump if reg is falsy or NULL
Hot path: dispatcher loop pc++ or pc=p2 (branch predictable)
